name: The Ironwood Golf Simulator Bar
about: Ironwood Golf Simulator Bar is a sports bar and golf simulator venue in Longmont, Colorado, offering a combination of golf simulation technology and a full bar with food service. The facility utilizes Full Swing simulators, an industry leader trusted by PGA professionals, providing a realistic golf experience year-round. It caters to a range of users, from serious golfers and league players to casual groups and those looking for a fun night out, with offerings including drop-in play, tournaments, and private events.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing simulators offer a realistic, data-driven golf experience
Access to world-famous courses like Pebble Beach regardless of weather
Robust golf leagues and weekend tournaments for competitive play
On-site PGA-trained pro for private lessons
Combination of serious practice and casual social atmosphere

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service with a menu including items like Caesar salad, smoked tri-tip roast, and shrimp dinners. Hosts special supper club events.
Full bar service with craft cocktails and local beers. Drink specials and happy hour are available.

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-of-the-line Full Swing simulators are used, the same technology trusted by PGA pros like Tiger Woods and Jon Rahm.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but it is standard practice for simulator venues to provide clubs for use on-site. It is recommended to bring your own for a familiar feel, though likely not required.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue has a full kitchen and bar that serves craft cocktails, local beers, and a full menu of food items.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time, but simulator play is generally faster than on-course golf, typically taking 1 to 2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be kid-friendly, hosting birthday parties and other family-friendly events. The sports bar atmosphere suggests it's open to patrons of all ages.
